reviews.review_description:
New review…
Best explanation  for the game, if you’re familiar with any of these games, berserk, robotron, smash tv and diablo now think a cute cat paper Mario  style graphics. 

The gameplay is seems simple but the lack of instructions of what is what and what your suppose to do can make you think there’s nothing to this game other than running around. 

 Here’s some tips I’ve found so far,

The gems monsters drop are to level you up . They work like do in rog games. The amount you need to collect increases with every level. Increasing levels gets you temporary perks. 

There are missions you need to complete within each map. You’ll find them on the main screen. 

You need to defeat the mini bosses to get  the better rewards. 

You get coins to buy power stats at the main screen, best advice is to upgrade speed and health before anything else .

Devs- 
Can you add a top down option? Also maybe  explanation of the monsters, the main hall and everything there?  Great game! 

Old review ….
Yes it’s basic, yes it’s cute, yes it addictive! 

What the game is trying to be, is perfect!
Are you guys dropping any time soon? Really want to play!!       Over…. Stilllllllllll waitinggggggggg

reviews.review_title: VR Wave Survival with Paper Mario Charm
reviews.review_description:
This game is an absolute delight! The adorable art style, reminiscent of Paper Mario, gives it a unique and charming feel, while the wave-based gameplay is just as addictive as Vampire Survivors. Building up your character, getting stronger, and dodging waves of enemies keeps every run exciting and rewarding.

The music is an absolute treat for the ears, and the gameplay is incredibly polished—everything just flows perfectly, making for a truly magical experience. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a fun, immersive, and beautifully crafted VR game! 🎮✨🔥

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your incredible feedback! 
I'm thrilled that you're enjoying the blend of charming art and the fast-paced, wave survival gameplay. It means the world to hear that the music, mechanics, and flow of the game are hitting the mark for you. Stay tuned for more updates and surprises. I can’t wait to share the full game with you soon!
